creator: makc@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to Marcelo Araujo from comment #6)
> Maybe I didn't understand well your suggestion about the QT port, but sounds
> more clean have it as an option on mlt port instead have another qtISHI-mlt.
> 
> If I'm wrong, please correct me :).

It is fine to have toolkit options for the top level ports, but for libraries this  leads to situation when one port wants Qt4 version of the library, and another one Qt5.
